title: エルムSの後に・わたし、がんばる

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Defeated, Haru Urara urges me to take her back
to the dorms immediately for more training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In addition, she says she wants to enter more G1
races, and, well, who am I to ignore such a
request?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So I decide to enter her in the JBC Sprint because
she excels at sprints on a dirt course.
